leadText: The Grip Claw (Japanese: ねばりのかぎづめ Grip Claw) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, it causes binding moves used by the holder to always bind for 5 turns. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, it causes binding moves used by the holder to always bind for 7 turns.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Pokémon hold item that extends the duration of multiturn attacks like Bind and Wrap. HG SS B W B2 W2 A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of multiturn attacks like Bind and Wrap. X Y OR AS S M US UM An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of multi-turn attacks like Bind and Wrap. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of multi-turn attacks, such as Bind and Wrap. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder uses moves that deal damage over several turns, such as Bind or Wrap, their effects will last longer than usual.
